primary_model.name: text-embedding-3-small
primary_model.description: Best overall balance of retrieval accuracy, speed, and cost for general English texts.

local_model.name: nomic-embed-text
local_model.description: Excellent open-source local embedding model with 8192 token context window. Ideal for offline-first RAG.

multilingual_model.name: BGE-M3
multilingual_model.description: State-of-the-art multilingual and hybrid search model. Recommended if searching across Telugu or Hindi contexts.

chroma.suitability: Development & Local testing. Lightweight, stores directly in filesystem, easy to set up.

qdrant.suitability: Production and offline-first mobile synchronization. Highly performant with hybrid search capabilities.

pinecone.suitability: Scalable production with zero server management overhead. Useful for persistent remote deployment.
